hero_subtitle: SFTY Business transforms fragmented provider outputs into a seamless compliance workflow that accelerates onboarding, strengthens audit evidence, and enhances decision traceability for VASPs.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance slows when provider checks disconnect
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to close the gap between scattered provider checks and final decisions. This disconnection creates manual workloads, inconsistent reviews, and weak audit trails that complicate onboarding and regulatory readiness for VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, screening results and regulatory updates into one structured compliance workflow to streamline decisions, preserve audit evidence and reduce manual handoffs for VASP operations.
workflow_title: From fragmented checks to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY consolidates disconnected provider outputs into a structured review workflow that guides cases, decisions, evidence and reporting for compliance teams.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One compliance control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects provider outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases, and evidence, enabling VASPs to close compliance gaps without replacing existing provider tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs closing gaps between fragmented provider checks and operational decisions with audit-ready evidence and controlled enterprise deployment from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY bridge check to decision gaps for VASPs
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how provider checks convert into compliance decisions
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports compliance case reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare deployment options for scalable compliance orchestration
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY close provider check gaps?
faq_1_answer: SFTY turns fragmented provider checks into one structured compliance workflow with cases, decisions, rule updates and reporting for clearer operational control across onboarding and transaction risk.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes and connects provider outputs into review workflows, case creation, decision logs and evidence, enabling faster onboarding and risk decision making within a single compliance layer.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting evidence to maintain an audit-ready trail for internal review and regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, structuring their outputs without requiring replacement or disruption of current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule providers, connecting their outputs into structured workflows rather than replacing them.
final_title: Turn fragmented checks into structured decisions
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider outputs into controlled workflows that close onboarding and compliance decision gaps.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
